data.name: Account_SignIn_Failed
data.value: Sign in failed. Invalid username or password.

data.name: Account_Privileged_Cannot_Use_This_Feature
data.value: This operation cannot be performed for privileged accounts.

data.name: Account_Has_Not_Activated
data.value: Account has not been activated yet.

data.name: Account_Email_Has_Not_Confirmed
data.value: Email address has not been confirmed yet.

data.name: Account_Email_Has_Already_Existed
data.value: This email address is already in use.

data.name: Account_Username_Has_Already_Existed
data.value: This username is already in use.

data.name: Account_Name_Cannot_Be_LessThan_2Characters
data.value: Name must be at least 2 characters.

data.name: Account_Surname_Cannot_Be_LessThan_2Characters
data.value: Surname must be at least 2 characters.

data.name: Account_Username_Cannot_Be_LessThan_5Characters
data.value: Username must be at least 5 characters.

data.name: Account_Please_Enter_Your_Email_With_Correct_Format
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: Account_Email_Cannot_Be_LessThan_5Characters
data.value: Email must be at least 5 characters.

data.name: Account_Password_Must_Include_1UpperLetter_AtLeast
data.value: Password must include at least 1 uppercase letter.

data.name: Account_Password_Must_Include_1LowerLetter_AtLeast
data.value: Password must include at least 1 lowercase letter.

data.name: Account_Password_Must_Include_1Digit_AtLeast
data.value: Password must include at least 1 digit.

data.name: Account_Password_Must_Include_1Symbol_AtLeast
data.value: Password must include at least 1 special character.

data.name: Account_Password_Cannot_Be_LessThan_8Characters
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: Account_Birthdate_Age_Cannot_Be_LessThan_12YearsOld
data.value: User must be at least 12 years old.

data.name: Account_Please_Take_New_VerificationCode
data.value: Please request a new verification code.

data.name: Password_ChangeSuccess
data.value: Your password has been changed successfully.

data.name: Password_ChangeFailed
data.value: Password could not be changed. Please check your current password.

data.name: Airline_IataCode_Already_Exists
data.value: This IATA code is already in use.

data.name: Airport_IataCode_Already_Exists
data.value: This IATA code is already in use.

data.name: Aircraft_TailNumber_Already_Exists
data.value: This tail number is already registered.

data.name: Manufacturer_Name_Already_Exists
data.value: This manufacturer name is already in use.

data.name: Flight_Number_Already_Exists
data.value: This flight number is already in use.

data.name: Flight_No_Available_Seats
data.value: No available seats on this flight.

data.name: Flight_Has_Active_Bookings
data.value: This flight has active bookings. Deletion is not allowed.

data.name: Booking_Already_Exists_For_This_Flight
data.value: You already have a booking for this flight.

data.name: Booking_Cannot_Cancel_Departed
data.value: Cannot cancel booking for a departed flight.

data.name: EmailContent_WelcomeNewUser
data.value: Hello {0}, welcome to FlightReservation! Your account has been created successfully.

data.name: EmailContent_BookingConfirmation
data.value: Hello {0}, your booking for flight {1} has been confirmed. PNR: {2}

data.name: EmailContent_BookingCancellation
data.value: Hello {0}, your booking for flight {1} has been cancelled. PNR: {2}

data.name: EmailContent_FlightReminder_7Days
data.value: Hello {0}, your flight {1} departs in 7 days. Departure: {2}. PNR: {3}

data.name: EmailContent_FlightReminder_24Hours
data.value: Hello {0}, your flight {1} departs in 24 hours. Departure: {2}. PNR: {3}

data.name: EmailContent_FlightCancelled
data.value: Hello {0}, flight {1} has been cancelled. PNR: {2}. A refund process will be initiated.

data.name: EmailContent_VerificationCode
data.value: Hello {0}, your verification code is: {1}. This code is valid for 15 minutes.

data.name: EmailContent_PasswordReset
data.value: Hello {0}, your password reset code is: {1}. This code is valid for 15 minutes.

data.name: EmailContent_PasswordChanged
data.value: Hello {0}, your account password has been changed successfully.

data.name: Email_Footer
data.value: © 2026 Flight Reservation System. All rights reserved.

data.name: Email_BookingConfirmed_Intro
data.value: your booking has been successfully created.

data.name: Email_BookingConfirmed_Note
data.value: Keep your PNR number. You will need it for check-in and booking changes.

data.name: Email_BookingCancelled_ContactNote
data.value: For questions or rebooking support, please contact our team.

data.name: Email_FlightCancelled_Intro
data.value: we regret to inform you that the flight in your reservation has been cancelled.

data.name: Email_FlightCancelled_Warning
data.value: Our team will contact you as soon as possible to help arrange an alternative flight or initiate a refund. We apologize for the inconvenience.

data.name: Email_FlightReminder_7Days_Desc
data.value: Your flight is just 7 days away! Please make sure your travel documents are ready.

data.name: Email_FlightReminder_24Hours_Desc
data.value: Your flight departs tomorrow! We recommend checking in online and having your boarding pass ready.

data.name: Email_VerificationCode_Intro
data.value: use the following verification code to complete your operation:

data.name: Email_VerificationCode_Warning
data.value: This code is valid for 10 minutes. Do not share it with anyone.

data.name: Email_VerificationCode_NotRequested
data.value: If you did not request this code, please disregard this email or contact our support team.

data.name: Email_UserSignedUp_Intro
data.value: Welcome to Flight Reservation! A verification code has also been sent to your email address to activate your account.

data.name: Email_UserSignedUp_Note
data.value: The verification code is valid for 10 minutes.

data.name: Email_PasswordChanged_Intro
data.value: your account password has been changed successfully.

data.name: Email_PasswordChanged_Warning
data.value: If you did not make this change, please contact our support team immediately and secure your account.

data.name: Sms_BookingConfirmed
data.value: Booking confirmed! PNR: {0} | Flight: {1} | {2}-{3} | {4} | Seat: {5} | Amount: {6}

data.name: Sms_FlightCancelled
data.value: IMPORTANT: Flight {0} ({1}-{2}) scheduled for {3} has been cancelled. PNR: {4}.{5} We will contact you to arrange an alternative flight.

data.name: Sms_FlightReminder
data.value: Reminder: Flight {0} ({1}-{2}) departs in {3} on {4}. PNR: {5}. Have a great trip!

data.name: Sms_VerificationCode
data.value: Flight Reservation - {0} code: {1}. Valid for 10 minutes. Do not share this code.

data.name: Sms_UserSignedUp
data.value: Hello {0} {1}, welcome to Flight Reservation! Your account has been created. You can sign in to start searching for flights.

data.name: Sms_PasswordChanged
data.value: Flight Reservation: Your account password was changed on {0}. If you did not make this change, please contact our support team immediately.

data.name: WhatsApp_BookingConfirmed
WhatsApp_BookingCancelled
WhatsApp_FlightCancelled
WhatsApp_FlightReminder
WhatsApp_VerificationCode
data.value:
✈ *Flight Reservation - {0}*

Your verification code:

*{1}*

⚠️ This code is valid for 10 minutes. Do not share it with anyone.

data.name: WhatsApp_UserSignedUp
data.value:
✈ *Flight Reservation — Welcome!*

Your account has been successfully created.

You can sign in to search and book flights.

data.name: WhatsApp_PasswordChanged
data.value:
✈ *Flight Reservation — Password Changed*

Your account password was changed on *{0}*.

⚠️ If you did not make this change, please contact our support team immediately.

data.name: WhatsApp_SendingProcess_Was_Failed
data.value: WhatsApp message could not be sent.

data.name: Redis_Cache_Entity_Could_Not_Be_Added
data.value: Data could not be added to cache.

data.name: Redis_Cache_Entity_Could_Not_Be_Deleted
data.value: Data could not be deleted from cache.

data.name: Unauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to perform this action.

data.name: Forbidden
data.value: Access to this resource is forbidden.
